translations.Customize the interface by hiding certai: Customize the interface by hiding certain applications from the menu (except Files and Activity) for you and for all users of this Framaspace.
translations.Check the box in the right column to hid: Check the box in the right column to hide an application and uncheck this same box to display it again. Don't forget to click "Save". On the next page reload, the icon will be hidden.
translations.Do you want to hide the icon?: Do you want to hide the icon?
